title: Troubleshoot SSO login errors
body:
# Troubleshoot SSO login errors

If you can't log in with SSO, try these steps based on the error you see:

- **"No account found for this email"** — confirm you're using your company email address, not a personal one. Contact your admin if your account hasn't been provisioned yet.
- **"Redirect URI mismatch" or similar configuration error** — this is usually an identity provider misconfiguration; contact your organization's IT administrator rather than retrying.
- **Stuck on a blank page after approving MFA** — clear your browser cache and cookies, then try again in a private/incognito window.
- **"Session expired" immediately after redirect** — check that your system clock is set correctly; SSO tokens are time-sensitive.

If none of these resolve the issue, contact support with the exact error message and the time you attempted to log in so we can check the authentication logs.
